title: n4m subset descriptor v1
description: Drives the vendored-source generation for slim packages (e.g. pls4all on PyPI/CRAN, future aompls, nirs4all-preprocessing, nirs4all-augmentation, nirs4all-selection). One YAML per package. Validated by catalog/scripts/validate_catalog.py.

status.description: active = builds glue is generated; planned = manifest declared but no build glue; deprecated = removed in a future release.

since_release.description: First unified release that activates this subset (e.g. '1.0.0' for nirs4all_methods + pls4all).

symbol_prefix.description: All slim packages share the same symbol prefix in v1.0.0.

exported_subset.description: If true, the vendored shared library exports only the subset's category-closure of n4m_* symbols.

categories.description: Whole categories included in the subset (e.g. 'models', 'selection'). Resolves to all methods whose category matches.

method_ids.description: Specific method_ids to include in addition to or instead of whole categories.

patterns.description: Glob patterns over method_id (e.g. 'preprocessing.scatter.*', 'models.pls.*'). Matched after categories + method_ids.

excludes.description: Hard exclude pass applied last, after includes.

audience.description: Free-text description of who this slim package is for.

pypi.description: null = not published on PyPI for this subset.

name.description: CRAN package name — letters / digits / dots only (no hyphens, no underscores).

vendored_lib_dir.description: Where the vendored C/C++ sources land under src/ (e.g. 'libn4m_pls4all').

cran.description: null = not published on CRAN for this subset (e.g. Python-only deep-learning audience).

activates_in_release.description: If status=planned, the unified release that will activate this subset (e.g. '1.1.0' for aompls if the AOM paper triggers it).
